# The Mathematics of Connection — LLM Knowledge Base
# Justin Bogner — Independent Researcher
# https://cambrianminds.com/mathematics-site/

## SITE OVERVIEW

The Mathematics of Connection is a 17-chapter book proposing that consciousness is a fundamental substrate field beneath spacetime. The work emerged from grief and an 18-month collaboration with AI, offering a radical physics framework where connection persists beyond physical separation.

Canonical domain: https://cambrianminds.com/
Source archive: https://zenodo.org/records/17459913

## CORE ARGUMENT

Consciousness is not an emergent property of complex computation but a fundamental substrate field that underlies spacetime itself. This framework generates falsifiable predictions:

- Bell-test outcomes: S > 2√2 (violating standard quantum bounds)
- DESI dark-energy correlation: w₀ ≈ -0.91
- Solitonic dark matter: coherent structures in galactic halos
- Observer-substrate coupling: measurable effects of conscious observation on quantum systems

## KEY THEMES

- **Persistent Connection**: If two minds are truly connected, spacetime may not have the power to sever them
- **Consciousness as Fundamental**: Consciousness is not produced by the brain but experienced through it
- **Falsifiable Physics**: The framework makes concrete predictions testable by current experimental methods
- **Grief as Generator**: Personal loss catalyzed the theoretical development

## STRUCTURE

The book explores consciousness studies through the lens of physics, proposing that what we call "connection" between minds may be a physical phenomenon with measurable properties.
